q: When you go out, what do you carry with you?
examiner_note: Nói về vật dụng thiết yếu. Sử dụng 'essentials', 'reusable', 'compact', 'indispensable'.

band7.text: I usually carry the essentials: my phone, wallet, keys, and a reusable water bottle. If I'm heading to work or university, I'll also have my laptop and some notebooks in a backpack to stay organized.
band7.note: Liệt kê rõ ràng và sử dụng từ vựng tốt (essentials, reusable).

band8.text: I tend to travel quite light, typically just carrying my smartphone, which serves as my wallet and navigator, and my house keys. If I’m out for the entire day, I’ll bring a compact bag with some basic necessities like a portable charger and a light jacket just in case the weather changes.
band8.note: Sử dụng từ vựng tự nhiên (travel light, compact, necessities, portable).

band9.text: My daily carry is quite streamlined, consisting of only the most indispensable items. My phone is paramount, as it manages my schedule and communications. I also prioritize a reusable water bottle and a small e-reader, as I value being both environmentally conscious and mentally stimulated during my commute.
band9.note: Sử dụng từ vựng ở mức độ cao (streamlined, indispensable, paramount, conscious, stimulated).

v.example: The company has a streamlined management structure.
A good dictionary is indispensable for language learners.
The safety of the passengers is paramount.

advanced_vocab.example: A car is a necessity in this rural area.

similar_questions: What is the most important thing you carry?
Do you ever forget to bring something when you go out?
